input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.5.12.7 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.5.12.7
            TITLE: in a sleeved butt joint, the bolts must be 6 mm metric grade 9.8 or 1/4 in sae grade 8

            CONTENT:
            rule F.5.12.7: In a Sleeved Butt Joint, the bolts must be 6 mm Metric Grade 9.8 or 1/4 in SAE Grade 8
F.5.12.7 In a Sleeved Butt Joint, the bolts must be 6 mm Metric Grade 9.8 or 1/4 in SAE Grade 8 
minimum diameter and grade.  See F.5.12.1 above

final_answer: In a Sleeved Butt Joint, the bolts must be 6 mm Metric Grade 9.8 or 1/4 in SAE Grade 8 minimum diameter and grade. See F.5.12.1 above
